Bus Timings

F23 Bus Schedule Stadium Bus Station to Al Nahda 1 Route Overview

October 1, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai Bus F23 provides a convenient connection between Stadium Bus Station and Al Nahda 1, Terminus, covering various key locations along the route. This service is designed to accommodate both daily commuters and casual travelers, offering frequent stops in busy neighborhoods and important landmarks.

Route Name F23
Route Description Stadium Bus Station · 8 - Al Nahda 1, Terminus
Total Distance Approximately 4.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 45 minutes
Operational Hours 04:35 to 00:10 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F23

Bus F23 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The bus operates with frequent services throughout the day. Here is a snapshot of the timings:

Bus F23 Timetable

For a full overview of the F23 bus schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or click here for F23 Bus Timings. To view the timetable from Stadium Bus Station to Al Nahda 1, please refer to the schedule provided below:

Some other RTA Dubai bus routes you can check out include the C10 bus route, which passes through Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid and Hamriya Port, as well as the F35 route, which travels between Mall of the Emirates and The Greens Terminus, before returning to Mall of the Emirates.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus F23 is AED 5. This price makes it an affordable option for passengers traveling the full length of the route or making shorter trips between stops. The cost is consistent across all stops, providing a simple and economical fare structure.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no online booking available for Bus F23. Passengers can pay for their fare directly upon boarding the bus. For the latest updates on service changes or ticketing options, it is recommended to check local transportation resources or the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) website.

Bus Route

Bus F23 operates between Stadium Bus Station · 8 and Al Nahda 1, Terminus.

  1. Stadium Bus Station · 8

  2. Al Maaref Private School

  3. Masjid Rada

  4. Al Banai

  5. Burj Al Nahda

  6. Zaafranah

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Burj Al Noor

  2. Al Nahda 1, Terminus 2

  3. Al Nahda 1, Terminus 1

These stops connect various residential areas, educational institutions, and commercial zones, making it a versatile option for travel within Dubai.

Bus F23 Station Overview

Stadium Bus Station · 8

Stadium Bus Station · 8 is a prominent transit hub located near major sports venues and facilities, making it a key point for sports fans and event-goers. It is well-equipped with essential amenities, including sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time bus schedule updates.

The station’s strategic location ensures easy access to stadiums and sporting events. Additionally, from this station, passengers can also catch the F23A bus, providing further convenience for traveling to and from major events. Its facilities and proximity to key attractions make it an integral part of the local transportation network.

Al Nahda 1, Terminus

Al Nahda 1, Terminus is a key bus station situated in the Al Nahda 1 area, serving as a central transit point for residents and commuters.

It offers amenities such as comfortable seating, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates, ensuring a smooth travel experience. Its strategic location in a busy commercial and residential area provides easy access to local shops, services, and nearby neighborhoods. By facilitating seamless connections between various routes, the terminus plays a crucial role in efficient transportation within and beyond the Al Nahda area, making it a vital hub for commuters across Dubai.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus F23 route passes through several areas in Dubai, offering access to a mix of local attractions and points of interest:

  1. Stadium Bus Station · 8: Near the Al Ahli Club Stadium, which hosts various sporting events.

  2. Burj Al Nahda: Close to the Al Nahda Pond Park, a popular spot for outdoor activities and picnics.

  3. Mirdif City Centre: A major shopping mall with numerous dining options, entertainment, and retail outlets.

  4. Al Nahda 1, Terminus: This area provides access to local shopping and dining options.

Journey Experience

The F23 bus route from Stadium Bus Station to Al Nahda 1 offers a long but intriguing journey through some of Dubai’s vibrant neighborhoods.

A highlight of the route is its proximity to Al Nahda Pond Park, a lesser-known local spot where families gather for picnics and evening strolls. This journey provides a unique perspective on the everyday life of Dubai, far from the glamour of the downtown area, giving riders a chance to experience the city’s cultural diversity and local charm. Despite the extended travel time, the route offers an authentic glimpse into the heart of Dubai’s residential life.

Traveling with Careem

Using the Careem app, you can easily travel to Al Nahda 1, Terminus, the furthest point on the F23 bus route, starting from Stadium Bus Station · 8. The fare for this journey ranges between AED 28 and AED 33, providing a convenient and comfortable option for reaching your destination. Whether you’re heading to Al Nahda for shopping, dining, or local attractions, Careem offers a reliable choice for a smooth travel experience.

With its extensive route and frequent service, Bus F23 is a key component of Dubai’s public transport network, facilitating easy travel between significant locations in the city. Whether you’re heading to a shopping destination or an educational institution, Bus F23 provides a reliable and efficient option. Its consistent scheduling ensures that passengers can plan their journeys with confidence, making it an essential part of daily commuting and city exploration in Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 1, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
